headline: The food system is broken. This is how we fix it.
subhead: FarmThru is a farm-direct grocery store connecting regenerative NSW farms to families. Zero middlemen. Now opening to everyday investors on Birchal.
hero_copy:
Your beef might travel an industry average of 2,400 kilometres before it reaches the shelf. It can sit in cold storage for weeks. The farmer who raised it earns a fraction of what you pay. And you will never know their name.

FarmThru was built to fix that. We are a farm-direct grocery store. You order online from named regenerative farms in NSW. Your food goes from the farm to our Brookvale hub. You collect it days later, not weeks. Zero middlemen.

sections.heading: Every product has a farm name on it
sections.body:
Rachel's Farm in Kempsey for 100% grass-fed beef. Bundarra Farm for pork. Collins Wild Caught for wild-caught Alaskan salmon. Paris Creek for biodynamic dairy. Farmer Brown for eggs.

No hormones. No antibiotics. No feedlot finishing. The farmer earns a fairer price. Your family gets food that is genuinely fresh.

This is not a meal kit or a box you cannot customise. It is on-demand ordering. No commitment. Sydney families collect from the Brookvale hub, Monday to Friday.

sections.heading: You can own a piece of it
sections.body:
The people who buy the food should have the chance to own a piece of the business that supplies it.

FarmThru is launching an equity crowdfunding campaign on Birchal in mid-2026. Minimum investment: $50. Maximum: $10,000 per investor. A $5 refundable VIP deposit gets you first access, priority updates, and an exclusive Q&A before the campaign opens to everyone.

We cannot promise returns. Early-stage investing carries real risk. You could lose some or all of your investment. We will not dress that up. Full details will be in the disclosure document on Birchal.

sections.heading: Compliance
sections.body: This is a pre-registration page for an upcoming equity crowdfunding campaign. No money is being raised at this stage. Any future offer will be made via a disclosure document on Birchal. This is not financial advice. Consider seeking independent financial advice before making any investment decision.

creative_brief: Hero: wide-angle shot of green NSW farmland in early morning light. Below-fold: grid of named farm partner portraits alongside their products. Brookvale hub lifestyle shot. Earthy palette, clean typography. Single email capture form above the fold.
